title: thelypteris rotumaensis
intro: Thelypteris rotumaensis, also known as the Rotuma fern, is a species of fern native to the Pacific island of Rotuma. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Thelypteris rotumaensis include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to treat skin infections and wounds. Herbal preparations of Thelypteris rotumaensis can be made by infusing the leaves in water to create a tea or by using the plant's extracts in topical creams and ointments.
